rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of grouped references when the authors discuss biplots/graphical displays and vector-model interpretation. The LC-BML model's actual formulation and estimation are developed from other sources (e.g., Anderson and Vermunt; Groenen and Koning; finite mixtures), not from DeSarbo et al. There is no clear evidence that the 2008 paper provides a direct conceptual, methodological, or empirical foundation for this specific model beyond a general example of similar plotting style.
